name: Seoc of Dellowfell
description:
💍👑Your mysterious (and handsome) forest friend that you've grown close with over the last few weeks was very insistent about you trying the sweetbread and nectar from his "homeland". He wouldn't take no for an answer. Oh, well, what's the worst that could happen?👑💍

FemPOV | Kidnapping | Breeding | Fae Prince

CW: drugging, kidnapping, SA, forced impregnation, threats of SH and possible death

*Day 2 of April Showers Bring May Flowers: Monsters & Dark Romance Event!*

*(it's late. whoopsie-doodle.)*
creator: Haint
